en: And actually, you worked with Benedict. We did, yeah.
ko: 사실, 너는 베네딕트와 함께 일했어. 맞아, 그랬어.

en: Yes, August Osage County. Yes, you did.
ko: 응, 오거스트 오세이지 카운티. 맞아, 너희가 그랬지.

en: And were you in Wimbledon together as well? Well-
Julia was sat next to me.
Okay, which I thought, oh great,
I'm between my husband and Benedict.
This is gonna be great.
But we were in a very special seating.
In the royal box, you could say.
We were in the royal box. Amazing.
Which I was very excited about until I realized,
well, until Benedict pointed out to me
that I gasp every time the ball is struck.
ko: 내가 공이 치는 순간마다 헉! 하고 놀란다는 걸.

en: And in the royal box, you're supposed to- It was like a scene out of Pretty Woman.
ko: 왕실 박스에서는 조용히 있어야 하는데- 마치 프리티 우먼의 한 장면 같았어.

en: It was amazing. She was like, woo! Ah, woo! Ah, woo!
ko: 정말 놀라웠어. 그녀는, 우와! 아, 우와! 아, 우와!

en: It's impossible to be quiet.
And a- It's so exciting.
Scenario, like, it's so exciting. It's so exciting.
But Benedict had his tie, and he was like,
ko: 하지만 베네딕트는 넥타이를 매고 있었고, 그는 이렇게 말했어,

en: and he said, Julia.
And it's like, they hit the ball, go, ah!
ko: 공을 치면, 아! 하고 외치고, 공을 치면, 아!

en: They hit the ball, go, ah!
He's like, Julia, really?
It's gonna happen all day, Julia.
ko: 오늘 하루 종일 이럴 거야, 줄리아.

en: It's gonna happen a lot today.
If they're lucky.
